query:
SELECT id, name, nickname, email, phone, role, roles, isActive, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE name IN ('张雪婷', '冯玉智', '曹心茹', 'test', '陈治霖', '许博睿') 
OR phone IN ('18835697789', '18321298886', '17760810422', '13381928825', '15321700153', '13161932601')
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT id, name, nickname, email, phone, role, roles, isActive, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE name IN ('张雪婷', '冯玉智', '曹心茹', 'test', '陈治霖', '许博睿') 
OR phone IN ('18835697789', '18321298886', '17760810422', '13381928825', '15321700153', '13161932601')
ORDER BY id;
